content_id: Segala puji bagi Allah, Tuhan semesta alam, dan semoga shalawat serta salam terlimpah kepada para rasul dan nabi — terutama Muhammad, rasul terakhir. Salam sejahtera atas mereka semua. Ini mengakhiri rangkaian kutipan dari "Surat-surat dari Penjara".
content_en: All praise is due to Allaah, Lord of the Worlds, and may His Peace and Blessings be upon the messengers and prophets - especially Muhammad the final messenger. Peace be upon them all. This concludes the series of excerpts from "Letters from Prison".
